SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlottery.models

Class Event

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlottery.models.Event
public class Event extends Object
Role: Data Model / Entity Purpose: Defines the core Event entity within the system. It encapsulates all metadata associated with an event, including descriptive content, scheduling information, attendee capacity constraints, and geographical coordinates for location-restricted waiting lists. Design Pattern: Data Transfer Object (DTO). This class facilitates the mapping of Firestore documents into local Java objects. Encapsulates the configuration and state of an event, including organizer details, participant limits, and media assets.

  • Constructor Details

    • Event

      public Event()
      Default constructor required for Firebase Firestore deserialization. Initializes lists and sets default status and creation timestamp.

    • Event

      public Event(String title, String description, String location, String organizerId, String organizerName, long eventStartDate, long eventEndDate, long registrationOpenDate, long registrationCloseDate, int capacity, int maxWaitingList, double price, String posterUrl, boolean isPrivate, boolean requireGeolocation)
      Constructs a new Event with full configuration details.
      Parameters:
      title - The event title.
      description - Detailed event description.
      location - Human-readable location name.
      organizerId - ID of the creating user.
      organizerName - Name of the creating user.
      eventStartDate - Start timestamp of the event.
      eventEndDate - End timestamp of the event.
      registrationOpenDate - Timestamp when registration begins.
      registrationCloseDate - Timestamp when registration ends.
      capacity - Max number of selected participants.
      maxWaitingList - Max size of the waiting list.
      price - Cost of the event.
      posterUrl - URL to the event image.
      isPrivate - Whether the event is hidden from public lists.
      requireGeolocation - Whether location is required to join.

  • Method Details

    • isRegistrationOpen

      public boolean isRegistrationOpen()
      Checks if the event is currently in the registration phase.
      Returns:
      True if current time is within registration bounds and status is open.

    • getDaysLeftToRegister

      public long getDaysLeftToRegister()
      Calculates time remaining until registration closes.
      Returns:
      Number of full days remaining.

    • getFormattedPrice

      public String getFormattedPrice()
      Formats the price for UI display.
      Returns:
      "Free" if price is 0, otherwise the price prefixed with $.

    • getId

      public String getId()
      Returns:
      Firestore document ID.

    • isPrivate

      public boolean isPrivate()
      Returns:
      True if the event is private. Annotated with PropertyName to map "private" in Firestore to privateEvent in Java.

    • setPrivate

      public void setPrivate(boolean aPrivate)
      Parameters:
      aPrivate - Privacy status.

    • isRequireGeolocation

      public boolean isRequireGeolocation()
      Returns:
      True if geolocation is required for registration.

      public void setRequireGeolocation(boolean requireGeolocation)
      Parameters:
      requireGeolocation - Geolocation requirement status.

      Returns:
      Current event status (open, closed, drawn, completed).

      Parameters:
